meaning: adj.不必要的,空闲的,多余的,讨厌的,有害的
examples: She tried to escape the unwanted attentions of her former boyfriend.
Unwanted recordings may simply be erased by demagnetizing.
Plows cut into the ground, and lift up weeds, and other unwanted plants.
And there lay Les Demoiselles d'Avignon (1907) for many, many years, unloved and unwanted, gathering dust.
However, one unwanted by-product of this is to lessen the natural sex drive of the patient.
